name: Mock Paneed Veal
recipeInstructions:
1. Using half butter and half oil, slowly heat 1/3 cup of the mixture in a heavy skillet.
2. Cut the chicken breasts into halves to produce four pieces.
3. Place each piece between wax paper and pound until they are 1/4 inch thick.
4. Cut each piece in half, season with salt and pepper.
5. Dip each piece in egg wash and coat evenly with bread crumbs.
6. Raise the heat under the oil and brown the chicken on both sides for about 2 minutes per side, being careful not to burn it.
7. Serve with lemon wedges.
